evidence.description: Single AuthState type with discriminated union
evidence.detail: use-auth.ts defines AuthState as: { state: 'loading', user: null } | { state: 'authenticated', user: User } | { state: 'unauthenticated', user: null }. useState is called exactly once (line 49) with AuthState type. No separate isLoading or isAuthenticated useState calls exist. The returned isLoading and isAuthenticated are computed: auth.state === 'loading' and auth.state === 'authenticated'.
Grep for 'useSyncExternalStore' in apps/dashboard/src/hooks/ returned zero matches. No dual source of truth between local state and external store.
Grep for 'useState.*isLoading' and 'useState.*isAuthenticated' in use-auth.ts returned zero matches. Only one useState<AuthState> call exists.

evidence.description: No auth flicker on dashboard page load
evidence.detail: Logged in as fe-test-2@galileo.test, navigated to /dashboard. Page loaded with stable authenticated content ('Welcome back, fe-test-2@galileo.test') — no visible flash of loading or unauthenticated state. Screenshots saved: val-fe-c9-dashboard-loaded.png, val-fe-c9-reload-stable.png.
React error #418 (hydration mismatch) present — this is a pre-existing SSR issue unrelated to auth state. No auth-related console errors.
